attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WSNAD.SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY, 
 WSNAD.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG,
 WSNAD.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
 WSNAD.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME,
 WSNAD.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
 WSNAD.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT, 
 WSNAD.PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,
 WSNAD.PD_SCAN_CREATION_DT,
 WSNAD.PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD, 
 WSNAD.PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
 WSNAD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WSNAD.PD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WSNAD.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 WSNAD.PD_SS_CD, 
 WSNAD.PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME, 
 WSNAD.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD,
 WSNAD.PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,
 WSNAD.PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG, 
 WSNAD.PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
 WSNAD.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 WSNAD.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 WSNAD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
 WSNAD.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
 WSNAD.START_TV_DTM,
 WSNAD.END_TV_DTM  ,
 WSNAD.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_SCA_NON_APLD_TRX_DRCT_RBK WSNAD
 WHERE WSNAD.DML_TYPE= 'I'
 AND  NOT  EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_NON_APLD_TRX_DRCT_RBK_TV NSNAD
WHERE WSNAD.SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY =  NSNAD.SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY)
